title: Online MasterClasses
description: Structured, deep-dive curriculum paths covering modern web architecture, cloud deployment, and system scale. Built for students seeking to jump from basic syntax to senior design structures.

title: Motivational & Keynote Speaking
description: Electrifying presentations on stage at tech conferences, university seminars, and corporate summits. Aman speaks on tech education, build-in-public mindsets, and creator strategies.

title: Live Coding & Hackathons
description: High-fidelity, interactive code-alongs and community challenges. We host cohorts that build real-world products live in 48 hours, bridging the gap between developers and recruiters.

title: Brand Collaborations
description: Connecting elite tech tools and products with a community of over 2.5 million aspiring programmers. We design interactive middleware demos, API videos, and sponsored tutorials.
